docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF METROPOLITAN CAPITAL BANK & TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN S ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METROPOLITAN CAPITAL BANK & TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAHMAN, HOSAIN S ,AN INDIVIDUAL $680,933.19 PRINCIPAL, $2,014.80 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $683,382.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76870890) FILED BY PLAINTIFF METROPOLITAN CAPITAL BANK & TRUST
